name: sandbox
description: Empty timeline for the manual-testing sandbox (npm run sandbox) — everything arrives via ad-hoc injection from the control panel or `sandbox inject <id>`. Adds templates for meeting-notes email, calendar invites, a threaded ask + outbound self-reply pair, and Tier-2 noise; the built-in default templates merge in automatically.

templates.label: Caro: meeting notes email with action items

event.text:
Subject: Notas — payments sync (action items, please review)

Resumen de la sync de hoy.

Action items:
- Maxo: please send the R-77 rollback plan to legal by Friday
- Maxo: agendar la revisión de fraude MX con Marian
- Diego: actualizar el runbook del velocity cap

templates.label: Calendar: incident review in 45 min (Marian attending)
Diego: asks for the design doc (thread T-SBX-1)

event.text: Che, ¿me pasás el design doc del velocity cap? Lo necesito para la review de mañana.

templates.label: Me: outbound reply in T-SBX-1 (resolution evidence)

event.text: Listo, te lo acabo de mandar por mail ✅

templates.label: Rodrigo (Tier 2): social noise — must die at the tier gate

event.text: ¿Viste el partido anoche? Increíble el segundo gol.
